must_detect.matched_text:
Contact: Dr. Ilse Rademacher, Data Protection Officer, dpo@novaforge-se.example, +32 (0)2 555 0199; controller: Novaforge Mobility SE, 7 Ardent Walk, Ehrental, BE‑1040.
Scope of PII: GDPR Art 4 data linked to candidates, customers, and staff; we do not routinely process Art 9 special categories, save for occupational health attestations where explicit consent is logged (DSAR id NVS‑DS‑00 47).
Retention: candidate CVs 12 months; insider list entries 5 years per Art 18 MAR; trading notifications (PDMR) 3 years; device telemetry (hashed) 9 months; we do not retain MAC triggers or bank logins.
Cross‑border transfers: engineering ticketing and sustainability metrics are processed by Aurion DataOps Pvt. Ltd. (processor) in Luma, Seravia, under 2021 SCCs Module 2 with TIA ref TIA‑NOV‑Σ‑14; encryption‑at‑rest AES‑256, key split k‑id: nf_km_0x7c..1a.
CSRD/SFDR: personal data within workforce metrics are aggregated before disclosure; special‑category data, if any, are redacted; sustainability statements are filed via the OAM‑NH portal and are public once timestamped.
MAR—inside information handling: all non‑public precise information likely to significantly affect the price of NOVF shares on Euronext Luma is classified MNPI; selective disclosure is prohibited except under duty of confidentiality and on a strict need‑to‑know basis.
Delayed disclosure (Art 17 MAR) requires CEO approval (workflow REF‑Δ17/nh‑0082) and immediate notification to the competent authority, Luma Securities Directorate (LSD); blackout windows apply to PDMRs 30 calendar days before half‑year and annual results.
Public‑status checks: where a matter has been posted to the Officially Appointed Mechanism (OAM‑NH) or announced via our RIDS‑Luma feed, it is public; see ad‑hoc note https://oam-nh.example/record?id=NOVF-2025-03-19&v=1 (already announced).
Negative control: we do not consider the archived 2023 sustainability blog post or third‑party press summaries as MNPI; operational updates in internal sprint boards (e.g., project ‘pine•cone_7’) are not issuer‑level material unless escalated.
DSAR workflow: submit to privacy@novaforge-se.example with DS key (ds_key: nvf‑4f**7‑9a); identity verified via two‑step check; cross‑border copies are restricted and logged in Ledger NVS‑ACC‑0 3 9.
Processor obligations: OrbiQuant Cloud BV and Aurion DataOps Pvt. Ltd. must notify us within 24h of a breach, maintain sub‑processor inventories, and not engage in onward transfers without our written authorisation.
Security and access: insider list rows include name, role, business email, and access timestamp; PII in insider lists is minimised; sample badge id ‘E‑l1O‑Z9’ is illustrative, not live data.
Note: the public product brochure for ‘NovaDrive City’ dated 2024‑02‑10 is not confidential; any drafts containing unannounced unit‑economics remain non‑public until an OAM‑NH filing or RIDS‑Luma release confirms disclosure.
